## Discussion

Use this endpoint to find creatives using a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] to filter results. If you don’t specify selector conditions, all creatives return in the response. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Creative] for field descriptions and selector condition operators.

Values are case-sensitive strings. The `orderBy` selector supports the `Id` and `name` fields.

# Find Creatives

**Web Service Endpoint**

Finds creatives within an organization.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to find creatives using a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] to filter results. If you don’t specify selector conditions, all creatives return in the response. See [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Creative] for field descriptions and selector condition operators.

Values are case-sensitive strings. The `orderBy` selector supports the `Id` and `name` fields.

### Payload example: Find creatives



## Creative Endpoints

- **Create a Creative**: Creates a creative object within an organization.
- **Get a Creative**: Fetches a creative by identifier.
- **Get All Creatives**: Fetches all creatives within an organization.
